questions.text: What is the main thrust of the author?
options: Formal education is more important than non-formal.
One should never cease to learn.
It is impossible to meet the needs of everyone.

questions.text: What should be the major characteristic of the future educational system?
options: No modules but standard compulsory programme for all.

questions.text: According to the author, what measures should open university adopt to meet modern conditions?
options: Develop various programmes for adult learners.
Open more colleges in traditional lines.
Cater to the needs of those who represent ‘cone’.
Primary education should be under the control of open universities.

questions.text: In the context of the passage, what is the meaning of the sentence “The writing is already on the wall”?
options: The signs of change are already visible.
